#  Disable Push Notifications for Drawings (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _If you subscribed yourself to the Drawings log,_ 'Read Only' or higher level permission on the Drawings tool.
    * _If you were added by another user,_ 'Admin' permission on the Drawings tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap **Settings**.
  3. Tap **Change Push Notification Settings**.
  4. Tap the **Drawings Published** toggle to the OFF ![Icon Toggle Off Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c185d4c70bbf732166622c7a8a58dde5/1abe11e94c00897cd543dd6198bb62e0/icon-toggle-off-ios.png?fm=webp&h=24) position.  
  
_Note:_ This action will disable push notifications for all Drawings logs. To remove push notifications for a specific Drawings log, navigate to the Drawings tool on Procore's web application to unsubscribe from a Drawings log. See [Unsubscribe from the Drawings Log](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/unsubscribe-from-the-drawings-log).


## See Also
  * [Enable Push Notifications for Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/enable-push-notifications-for-drawings-ios)
  * [Share Drawings Within Procore (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/share-drawings-within-procore-ios)
  * [Who receives a notification for updates in the Drawings tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-who-receives-a-notification-for-updates-in-the-drawings-tool)
title: Disable Push Notifications for Drawings (iOS)
description: How to disable push notifications for the Drawings tool on the Procore iOS app.
